atlas v0.5
Back To Use Cases

Use Case

Style Atlas / Reference Library

适合风格库、灵感库、模板库和设计参考站。关键是先给图像入口，再给分类、再给详情页。

Primary Family

Curated Reference Directory

Structures

Catalog Explorer

Why This Fit Works

从任务反推视觉和结构

Content Shape

Many parallel references, screenshot-heavy browsing, repeatable cards.

User Goal

快速比较风格、看真实案例、生成后续 agent 可复用的 style packet。

Why

首页先做图像入口，详情页再把风格语法讲清楚。

Avoid

  • 首页塞满理论说明
  • 只有截图没有分类
  • 一上来就逼用户读长文

Recommended Families

这个场景最适合借哪几条家族

Web Family

Curated Reference Directory

Index-first, browse-first, filter-friendly. The homepage acts like a visual directory rather than a manifesto.

Historical Roots

Swiss / International Typographic StylePostmodern / Memphis

Best For

reference atlasestemplate librariesinspiration directories
Open family
Web Family

Swiss Typographic Grid

Order-forward, grid-led, typographic systems for archives, references, identities, and anything that must stay legible while it grows.

Historical Roots

Swiss / International Typographic Style

Best For

archivesidentity studiosreference libraries
Open family

Prompt Packet

可以直接复制给 agent 的场景提示

Prompt Packet

Style Atlas / Reference Library

Content type: Style Atlas / Reference Library IA layer: Catalog Explorer Visual family: Curated Reference Directory + Swiss Typographic Grid Reference packet: Curated Reference Directory / Swiss Typographic Grid Mood: 适合风格库、灵感库、模板库和设计参考站。关键是先给图像入口，再给分类、再给详情页。 Required traits: 快速比较风格、看真实案例、生成后续 agent 可复用的 style packet。 Avoid: 首页塞满理论说明 / 只有截图没有分类 / 一上来就逼用户读长文

Design Zondev is a design-style atlas: movement → family → structure → prompt packet.

Updated 2026-03-30 · design.zondev.top
